enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ice Cream Penney'?

The song 'Ice Cream Penney' expresses the playful and romantic feelings between two lovers, highlighting their connection and joy in being together.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Vaaliba Raja'?

Vaaliba Raja is a comedy film that revolves around the life of a young man navigating love and relationships, with this song capturing the essence of his romantic escapades.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Arjun and Radhan, with music composed by Radhan himself.

When was 'Ice Cream Penney' released?

'Ice Cream Penney' was released on July 1, 2014, as part of the movie Vaaliba Raja.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ice Cream Penney', the playful lyrics and upbeat melody create a lively atmosphere that reflects the carefree spirit of young love. The song showcases the chemistry between the lead characters in Vaaliba Raja, emphasizing their romantic connection and shared moments of joy. With its catchy tune and engaging rhythm, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect addition to any festive gathering. The vibrant collaboration between Arjun and Radhan adds a unique charm to this delightful track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ice Cream Penney from Vaaliba Raja is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Arjun and Radhan. This upbeat duet captures the essence of youthful romance with its catchy lyrics and infectious rhythm. Dive into the world of this delightful track that perfectly complements any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: The moment I see you, my heart starts racing. My night comes alive when you are near me.
I can't sleep without seeing you; I don't understand what you want from me.
we were meant to be like a destiny can you fill it our baby baby. When you next to me I can never see anyone else but you baby.
Girl, when you smile, it lights up everything. Girl, you are shining next to me.
Because I believe you are sitting next to me. Yesterday I was talking to you on Facebook, and now you are sitting face to face with me, I just don't know what to do.
I am feeling lonely, and I am complaining that I am not getting any attention. I can't believe that she sat there next to me so quickly.
If you come to me, baby, I swear I will make you love me. Don't worry, you know that I am ready.
If you come to me, baby, I swear I will make you happy. Don't worry, you know that I am ready.
You are my ice cream lady, chocolate, vanilla, strawberry. If you get a minute, just contact me on Facebook or WhatsApp.
Girl, what do you call this feeling I have? Tell me, is this a fantasy or is this real?
I am feeling lonely, and I am complaining that I am not getting any attention. I can't believe that she sat there next to me so quickly.
If you come to me, baby, I swear I will make you love me. Don't worry, you know that I am ready.
If you come to me, baby, I swear I will make you happy. Don't worry, you know that I am ready.
The moment I see you, my heart starts racing. My night comes alive when you are near me.
I can't sleep without seeing you; I don't understand what you want from me.
If you come to me, baby, I swear I will make you love me. Don't worry, you know that I am ready.
If you come to me, baby, I swear I will make you happy. Don't worry, you know that I am ready.
Because I am ready for you, baby, come and get it.
